data.title: Merck gets EU CHMP green light for ENFLONSIA™ to prevent RSV in infants during their first season. #MRK #RSV
data.description: Merck has recently received a positive opinion from the European Medicines Agency Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use for ENFLONSIA™ (clesrovimab). This opinion pertains to the prevention of respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) in infants during their first RSV season. This development marks a significant step in combating RSV, a common respiratory virus affecting infants. The positive CHMP opinion demonstrates the potential effectiveness of ENFLONSIA™ in addressing this health concern. This milestone showcases Merck’s commitment to advancing healthcare solutions.

data.title: Global electric bus market to reach $59.60 billion by 2032, growing at 14.0% CAGR from $23.80 billion in 2025.
data.description: A report by MarketsandMarkets forecasts that the worldwide electric bus market, valued at USD 23.80 billion in 2025, is expected to reach USD 59.60 billion by 2032, showing a 14.0% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) during this period. The increase is attributed to recent developments in battery technology and the growing demand for sustainable transportation options.

data.title: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. approved for TSX normal course issuer bid to buy up to 1,768,841 shares (~5% of total shares).
data.description: Kolibri Global Energy Inc., based in Thousand Oaks, California, disclosed its plans for a normal course issuer bid on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: KEI, NASDAQ: KGEI). The TSX has approved the Company's notice to repurchase approximately 1,768,841 common shares, equal to about 5% of the total 35,376,833 Shares currently in circulation as of September 10, 2025. The buyback will be conducted through the exchange's facilities.

data.title: ETHFI struggles at $1.70 resistance amid mixed technical signals. Price at $1.56 after 3.93% drop, RSI at 65.35. Consolidation expected.
data.description: The price of ETHFI has dropped by 3.93% to $1.56, nearing the critical resistance level of $1.70. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 65.35, indicating a period of possible consolidation in the near future.

data.title: BizClik brings global sustainability leaders together at Climate Week NYC 2025 on Sept 22 to accelerate climate action.
data.description: BizClik is set to launch Sustainability LIVE: Climate Week NYC 2025 on September 22 in New York. The event, organized through its Sustainability Magazine and LIVE series, aims to accelerate global climate action. Scheduled to take place on September 22, 2025, the event anticipates participation from various stakeholders and experts in the sustainability sector. This initiative underscores BizClik's commitment to promoting sustainable practices and addressing climate change.

data.title: "Crypto AI tokens saw a $16bn market value surge, but lost a third of it in 8 months as investors face uncertain future."
data.description: The latest trend in the crypto world is DeFAI, which involves artificial-intelligence agents navigating decentralized finance. The market value of AI-agent coins peaked at around $16 billion in January but has since dropped by nearly a third. Despite this, Wall Street is seeing record highs in AI-infrastructure spending. The initial promise of sweeping automation with DeFAI projects like Virtuals' G.A.M.E. and Ai16z's ElizaOS has led to the creation of decentralized hedge funds where investors pool cash and agents manage it. However, the drop in value may indicate speculative self-delusion, though it could also signal a lasting shift in the market. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Weekly tech roundup: Xplor Technologies merges with Clubessential Holdings, Dyna Robotics secures $120M funding, DXC launches Global AI Center of Competence.
data.description: This week saw significant tech updates with Xplor Technologies and Clubessential Holdings announcing a merger. Dyna Robotics successfully secured $120 million in funding. Additionally, DXC introduced its Global AI Center of Competence. These advancements were highlighted in a recent report from New York on September 19, 2025.
